===== CPU frequency governor =====
/sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu0/cpufreq/scaling_governor: powersave
/sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu1/cpufreq/scaling_governor: powersave
/sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu2/cpufreq/scaling_governor: powersave
/sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu3/cpufreq/scaling_governor: powersave

===== CPU current frequency =====
/sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu0/cpufreq/scaling_cur_freq: 1400043
/sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu1/cpufreq/scaling_cur_freq: 1399473
/sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu2/cpufreq/scaling_cur_freq: 1400015
/sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu3/cpufreq/scaling_cur_freq: 1399992
